visual: Raises one knee high as the fist drops vertically into the open palm at waist height, producing an audible clap — the signature opening of Chen-style.
motion_description: From a wide stance, the torso rotates to the right as both arms sweep horizontally across the body. Weight shifts backward onto the left leg, drawing the right foot lightly inward, while the right hand forms a loosely curled fist near the chest and the left hand extends forward. The continuous flow culminates in a sharp action as the right knee lifts high and stomps down steadily, driving the right fist vertically into the open left palm at waist height.
